message:
feat(tui): integrate live event results into message browser (br-1xt0m.1.9.1)

Complete the deferred live-results integration in the Messages screen.
Live MessageSent/MessageReceived events from the ring buffer are now
merged into search results with proper field extraction, dedup by ID,
project filtering, and timestamp-descending sort order.

- Rewrite search_live_events to pattern-match MailEvent variants and
  extract structured fields (from, to, subject, thread_id, project)
  instead of using Debug format
- Merge live events into execute_search with dedup against DB results
- Remove dead _live_results call from view() (was deferred to br-10wc.6.3)
- Remove #[allow(dead_code)] on timestamp_micros (now used for sorting)
- Add test: search_live_events_extracts_structured_fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
